checks.basis: LDR at 10 lux typical: R ~ 10 kOhm (GL5528 datasheet 10 lux range 8-20 kOhm, typical 10 kOhm). Tap = 5V * R_FIXED/(R_LDR + R_FIXED) = 5 * 10k/20k = 2.500V at the typical value. Window +/-5% [2.375, 2.625] reflects that a CdS cell is specified as a RANGE at 10 lux (the value is not exact like an NTC's R25); it still absorbs only a small part of the 8-20k spread, so the assertion tracks the typical build point. The sibling circuit photoresistor_divider_dark proves the tap collapses in darkness.
